items.name: Create Tasks
items.description: Create tasks with titles, deadlines, priorities, and notes in just a few clicks.

items.name: Edit Tasks
items.description: Update task details, deadlines, priorities, and progress whenever needed.

items.name: Delete Tasks
items.description: Remove completed or unnecessary tasks with confirmation prompts.

items.name: Subtask Management
items.description: Break large tasks into smaller subtasks and track their completion individually.

items.name: Interactive Bubbles
items.description: Visualize every task as a floating bubble that stays visible on your desktop workspace.

items.name: Drag and Drop
items.description: Move task bubbles freely and organize your workspace naturally.

items.name: Priority Colors
items.description: Bubble colors change dynamically based on task priority and completion status.

items.name: Bubble Animations
items.description: Smooth floating, hover, and interaction animations make task management engaging.

items.name: Checklist Progress
items.description: Monitor subtask completion percentages in real time.

items.name: Deadline Countdown
items.description: View the remaining time for every task directly from the bubble.

items.name: Overdue Alerts
items.description: Overdue tasks are automatically highlighted to grab your attention.

items.name: Focus Mode
items.description: Filter distractions and display only the tasks that matter most.

items.name: Smart Notifications
items.description: Receive desktop notifications for upcoming deadlines and important reminders.

items.name: Priority Queue
items.description: Sort tasks automatically by urgency and importance.

items.name: Search & Filters
items.description: Quickly find tasks using categories, priorities, and keywords.

items.name: Light & Dark Themes
items.description: Switch seamlessly between light and dark mode.

items.name: Tooltips
items.description: Hover over bubbles and controls to see detailed information.

items.name: Responsive Layout
items.description: Enjoy a clean interface that adapts to different screen sizes.

items.name: Personal Workspace
items.description: Arrange bubbles and customize your workspace according to your preferences.

items.name: Auto Save
items.description: All task changes are saved automatically to prevent data loss.

items.name: Persistent Storage
items.description: Tasks remain available even after restarting the application.

items.name: User-Specific Data
items.description: Each user's tasks and settings are stored separately.

items.name: Real-Time Updates
items.description: Changes are reflected instantly across the application.
